uplink.description: WELL sensor reading, all channels active (gases warmed up)
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds WELL sensor frame. Expected values produced by running reference/upstream-codec.js (InbiotDeviceDecode, WELL branch) on these bytes, then normalized: temperature/humidity (/10) -> air.temperature/air.relativeHumidity, co2 -> air.co2, gases/PM/TVOC/HCHO -> camelCase air extras, CO /10, indices/type/noise/counter -> top-level camelCase extras. uint16 fields are big-endian per upstream getUint16.

uplink.description: WELL sensor reading, gases preheating and mold still calculating (noise channel absent)
uplink._note: Synthetic WELL frame exercising the preheating (0xffff -> 'Preheating') gas branch, the mold 'Calculating' (0xff) marker, and the absent-noise branch (bytes[37] === 0 -> noiseDb omitted). Expected produced via reference/upstream-codec.js then normalized as above.

uplink.description: Device configuration message (bytes[0] === 0) carries no measurements
uplink._note: Synthetic. The shared inBiot payload multiplexes config (0), sensor (1) and info (2) frames on bytes[0]; only the sensor frame carries measurements, so non-sensor frames are reported as errors rather than a bare {} (output contract). reference/upstream-codec.js would decode this to device-config fields, which are not measurement data.
Synthetic guard vector: an empty byte array yields no measurement.
